title: Mandalore the Indomitable's shuttle
content:
{{Top|leg}}
{{Conjecture|legends}}
[[File:Mandaloresshuttle.jpg|thumb|Mandalore the Indomitable's shuttle.]]
'''Mandalore the Indomitable's shuttle''' was a vessel used by [[Mandalore the Indomitable]].

==History==
The Mandalore used this vessel to travel from the [[Empress Teta system/Legends|Empress Teta system]] to [[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin 4]], to acquire assistance from [[Exar Kun/Legends|Exar Kun]] in rescuing [[Ulic Qel-Droma/Legends|Ulic Qel-Droma]] from [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]].

==Appearances==
*[[Tales of the Jedi – The Sith War 3|''Tales of the Jedi – The Sith War'' 3]]
